title: Crispy Tangy Algerian Quinoa Salad
description: A quick, lowFODMAP Algerian quinoa salad bursting with tangy lemon, aromatic fivespice, and a satisfying crunch from toasted sesame seeds.
instructions: Rinse quinoa under cold water and drain.
Bring 2 cups water to a boil in a saucepan. Add quinoa, reduce heat, cover, and simmer 15 minutes until liquid is absorbed.
Remove from heat, fluff with a fork, let stand 5 minutes, then transfer to a large bowl to cool slightly.
Heat garlic‑infused olive oil in a small pan over medium heat. Add five spice powder and cook 30 seconds to release aromas.
Pour the hot oil over the warm quinoa, then add lemon juice, salt, and pepper. Toss to coat evenly.
Add diced cucumber, bell pepper, toasted sesame seeds, and chopped parsley; gently fold to combine.
Taste and adjust seasoning if needed.
Transfer to a serving bowl and garnish with extra parsley if desired.
Serve immediately or refrigerate up to 2 hours for a chilled version.
